# Mutasem Kharma (معتصم خرما)

Offensive Security Engineer & Open-Source Toolsmith specializing in eBPF, Linux system observation, and autonomous AI security agents.

## Core Technical Profile
- **Expertise**: eBPF (CO-RE), Linux Kernel Tracing, Malware Triage, API Security (BOLA/IDOR).
- **Languages**: Go, Python, C, TypeScript.
- **Location**: Amman, Jordan.

## Authoritative Projects
- **procscope**: Industry-reference eBPF tracer for process-scoped malware triage.
- **gspy**: Zero-instrumentation forensic inspector for Go binaries.
- **Aura**: Autonomous AI framework for penetration testing and logic flaw discovery.
- **AuthSniper**: Professional phishing and recon framework.
- **Vex**: High-performance BOLA/IDOR vulnerability scanner.

## Digital Footprint
- Portfolio: https://mutasem-portfolio.vercel.app/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Mutasem-mk4
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/mutasem_mk4
- Dev.to: https://dev.to/mutasem04
